mapper.sql: application_id, application_no, application_type, title, content, applicant_user_id, applicant_name, applicant_role, status, approver_user_id, approver_name, review_comment, submit_time, review_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: select from campus_application where applicant_user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc, application_id desc
select from campus_application where status = '1' and approver_user_id = #{userId} order by submit_time asc, application_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into campus_application ( application_no, application_type, title, content, applicant_user_id, applicant_name, applicant_role, status, approver_user_id, approver_name, submit_time, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{applicationNo}, #{applicationType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{applicantUserId}, #{applicantName}, #{applicantRole}, #{status}, #{approverUserId}, #{approverName}, #{submitTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update campus_application set status = '1', submit_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate() where application_id = #{applicationId} and applicant_user_id = #{userId} and status = '0'

update campus_application set status = '2', approver_user_id = #{approverUserId}, approver_name = #{approverName}, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, review_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{approverName}, update_time = sysdate() where application_id = #{applicationId} and status = '1'

update campus_application set status = '3', approver_user_id = #{approverUserId}, approver_name = #{approverName}, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, review_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{approverName}, update_time = sysdate() where application_id = #{applicationId} and status = '1'
mapper.select: select distinct u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id where ur.role_id in (1, 111, 112) and u.del_flag = '0' and u.status = '0'
